seoTitle: Garden Grove Unified (GGUSD) School Calendar 2026-2027: Start Date, Holidays & Breaks
seoDescription: Find the Garden Grove Unified School Calendar 2026-2027 with first day of school, holidays, winter recess, spring recess, last day, printable view, and calendar download options.
heroSummary: Garden Grove Unified, also known as GGUSD, starts the 2026-2027 school year on Monday, August 17, 2026 and ends on Friday, May 28, 2027. Parents and students can use this page to quickly check school start dates, vacation periods, holidays, and important no-school days throughout the year.
calendarNotes: Garden Grove Unified, also known as GGUSD, publishes the 2026-2027 calendar as an official online list rather than a PDF download. The school year starts August 17, 2026 and ends May 28, 2027. Winter Recess is the longest listed break, and Spring Recess runs March 29-April 2, 2027. Families should use the GGUSD calendar page for the official online source and check school-level communications for site-specific events.
faqSchemaExclude: Why is there no PDF link

calendarFaqs.q: When does Garden Grove Unified start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Garden Grove Unified starts the 2026-2027 school year on Monday, August 17, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Garden Grove Unified Spring Recess in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Recess runs Monday, March 29 through Friday, April 2, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Garden Grove Unified in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Friday, May 28, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: Why is there no PDF link for the GGUSD 2026-2027 calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: The reviewed GGUSD source is an official online calendar list. No PDF download link was provided for this school year.

calendarFaqs.q: Does GGUSD have school on Friday before Thanksgiving?
calendarFaqs.a: No. Friday, November 27, 2026 is listed as the end of Thanksgiving Recess, so students are not scheduled for regular classes that day.

calendarFaqs.q: How many weeks is GGUSD summer break?
calendarFaqs.a: The 2026-2027 GGUSD school year ends May 28, 2027. Summer break length depends on the next approved school-year start date, so families should verify the following year's official GGUSD calendar before making long-range plans.

calendarFaqs.q: What are the main no-school days in the GGUSD 2026-2027 calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: Major no-school periods include Thanksgiving Recess, Winter Recess, Spring Recess, Labor Day, Veterans Day, Martin Luther King Jr. Day, Lincoln Day, Presidents' Day, and Memorial Day.

calendarFaqs.q: When does GGUSD summer break start in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last scheduled student day is Friday, May 28, 2027, so summer break begins after the final day of school. Families should confirm the next approved GGUSD calendar before making long-range summer plans.

calendarFaqs.q: How many days is Winter Break for GGUSD 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Recess runs from Monday, December 21, 2026 through Friday, January 1, 2027, covering 10 weekdays without school.

calendarFaqs.q: Does GGUSD have school on Veterans Day 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: No. Veterans Day is listed as a districtwide school holiday on Wednesday, November 11, 2026.

customSections.label: 2026-2027 GGUSD Calendar at a Glance
customSections.content: Use this short overview for the Garden Grove Unified dates families most often need before reviewing the full calendar list.

groups.label: At a glance
items: School starts: August 17, 2026.
School ends: May 28, 2027.
School year length: August 17, 2026-May 28, 2027.
Longest break: Winter Recess, December 21, 2026-January 1, 2027.
Spring Recess: March 29-April 2, 2027.
Instructional days: 180.

customSections.label: Printable GGUSD Calendar 2026-2027
customSections.content: Families searching for a printable GGUSD calendar can use this page as a printable-friendly view of the reviewed district dates. The official Garden Grove Unified source provides calendar dates online, and MySchoolDates adds a searchable date list plus a one-time calendar import file for digital planning.

groups.label: Printable and download options
items: Use the official GGUSD calendar webpage as the source of record.
Download the printable PDF generated by MySchoolDates from the reviewed GGUSD calendar records.
Download the .ics file if you prefer Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, or Outlook planning.

links.label: Download Printable PDF Calendar
links.description: Open the MySchoolDates printable PDF generated from the reviewed GGUSD 2026-2027 calendar dates.

customSections.label: Parent Planning Guide for GGUSD 2026-2027
customSections.content: Garden Grove Unified families can use the 2026-2027 calendar to plan back-to-school preparation, childcare, travel, appointments, and end-of-year activities around districtwide dates.

groups.label: Before school starts
items: Review enrollment updates, school supply lists, transportation information, and campus-specific schedules before August 17, 2026.
Check GGUSD school announcements for orientation, back-to-school registration, and program-specific dates.
Confirm childcare and transportation routines before the first instructional week.

groups.label: Before long breaks
items: Thanksgiving Recess and Spring Recess are useful planning windows for short trips and childcare coverage.
Winter Recess starts December 21, 2026, and students return after the New Year holiday period on January 4, 2027.
Winter Recess is the longest scheduled student vacation period in the 2026-2027 GGUSD calendar.
Verify campus events, athletics, and testing before booking non-refundable travel.

groups.label: Before the last day
items: Use the May 28, 2027 last day for summer childcare and travel planning.
Check school-level notices for ceremonies, final exams, minimum days, and activity schedules.
Confirm the next school-year calendar before making long-range summer plans.

customSections.label: How to Add the GGUSD Calendar to Google Calendar
customSections.content: Parents can import the GGUSD calendar file into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, or Outlook as a one-time calendar file generated from the reviewed dates on this page.

groups.label: Import steps
items: Download the .ics calendar file from this page.
Open Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, or Outlook.
Choose the import calendar option and upload the .ics file.
Review the imported school holidays, recesses, and key dates after import.

customSections.label: GGUSD No-School Days Explained
customSections.content: Not every no-school day is a major school break. GGUSD calendars may include legal holidays, recess periods, staff development days, student-free days, and districtwide closures. School-specific minimum days or activity schedules may still appear only in campus announcements.
